findings.description: The HTML adds fabricated metadata and styling content not present in the PDF, including a standalone theme name, CSS variables, and an external font import.
findings.evidence: HTML contains text/code such as "Digital Commons NC — Standalone Theme CSS", "@import url('https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Source+Sans+3...')", and CSS variable names like "--nc-navy" and "--nc-blue". The source PDF pages only show the report title "FNS ACTIVE CASE ERROR RATES" with the table; no such theme label, font URL, or CSS text appears.

findings.description: Heading structure does not accurately reflect the document structure. The PDF presents the title as a document heading with a subtitle, but the HTML uses an h2 in the header and no h1.
findings.evidence:
PDF top center shows "FNS ACTIVE CASE ERROR RATES" with subtitle "Oct 15 - Sept 16". HTML uses "

FNS ACTIVE CASE ERROR RATES

Oct 15 - Sept 16

" and no h1 is present.
